tasks.title: Initialize Next.js Project with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
tasks.description: Set up the foundational Next.js project structure with TypeScript configuration, Tailwind CSS styling framework, and basic Supabase/Drizzle ORM setup
tasks.details: Initialize Next.js project using `npx create-next-app@latest memora --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app` with App Router. Configure tsconfig.json for strict type checking. Set up Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme colors and typography. Install Supabase client and Drizzle ORM dependencies. Create basic folder structure: /components, /lib, /types, /hooks, /utils, /db. Set up environment variables template (.env.example) including Supabase configuration. Configure Drizzle ORM with basic schema structure and connection setup.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify project builds successfully with `npm run build`. Check TypeScript compilation with `npm run type-check`. Validate Tailwind CSS classes work in a test component. Ensure ESLint passes with `npm run lint`. Test Supabase connection and Drizzle ORM initialization.

subtasks.title: Initialize Next.js App Router project
subtasks.description: Create new Next.js project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and ESLint using App Router
subtasks.details: Run `npx create-next-app@latest memora --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app` to initialize the project with App Router structure

subtasks.title: Configure TypeScript settings
subtasks.description: Set up strict TypeScript configuration for better type safety
subtasks.details: Update tsconfig.json with strict mode, path mapping, and appropriate compiler options

subtasks.title: Set up Tailwind CSS configuration
subtasks.description: Configure Tailwind CSS with custom theme and typography
subtasks.details: Customize tailwind.config.js with project-specific colors, fonts, and responsive breakpoints

subtasks.title: Install and configure Supabase
subtasks.description: Add Supabase client for database and authentication
subtasks.details: Install @supabase/supabase-js and set up client configuration with environment variables

subtasks.title: Install and configure Drizzle ORM
subtasks.description: Set up Drizzle ORM for type-safe database operations
subtasks.details: Install drizzle-orm, drizzle-kit, and pg dependencies. Create basic drizzle.config.ts and database connection setup

subtasks.title: Create project folder structure
subtasks.description: Set up organized folder structure for the application
subtasks.details: Create directories: /components, /lib, /types, /hooks, /utils, /db for database schemas

subtasks.title: Configure development tools
subtasks.description: Set up Prettier, ESLint rules, and development scripts
subtasks.details: Install and configure Prettier, update ESLint configuration, add npm scripts for type checking

subtasks.title: Create environment configuration
subtasks.description: Set up environment variables template with Supabase settings
subtasks.details: Create .env.example with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, and DATABASE_URL placeholders

tasks.title: Design and Implement Database Schema
tasks.description: Create PostgreSQL database schema with User, Memo, and Category tables using Supabase and Drizzle ORM according to the specified data model
tasks.details: Set up Supabase PostgreSQL database project. Use Drizzle ORM to define schema for User table (id, email, password_hash, created_at, updated_at), Memo table (id, user_id, title, content, summary, category_id, created_at, updated_at), and Category table (id, name, description, user_id, created_at). Implement foreign key constraints and indexes for performance using Drizzle schema definitions. Configure Drizzle migrations and connect to Supabase database. Set up connection pooling through Supabase's built-in connection management.
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests for Drizzle schema definitions. Test CRUD operations for each table using Drizzle queries. Verify foreign key constraints work correctly. Check Drizzle migrations run successfully against Supabase. Test database connection and query performance with Supabase connection pooling.

tasks.title: Implement JWT-based Authentication System
tasks.description: Build secure user authentication system with registration, login, and JWT token management using Supabase Auth
tasks.details: Integrate Supabase Auth service for user authentication. Set up Supabase client configuration with proper environment variables. Implement user registration using Supabase's signUp method. Create login functionality with Supabase's signInWithPassword. Set up automatic session management using Supabase's built-in JWT handling. Create auth context for client-side state management with Supabase session. Implement protected route middleware using Supabase's getUser method. Add email verification flow using Supabase's email confirmation. Create logout functionality with Supabase's signOut method. Configure Supabase Auth policies for row-level security.
tasks.testStrategy: Test user registration with Supabase Auth integration. Verify login functionality with Supabase credentials. Test automatic JWT token refresh through Supabase. Check protected routes work with Supabase session validation. Test email verification flow. Verify logout clears Supabase session properly. Test Supabase Auth error handling for invalid credentials.

subtasks.title: Set up Supabase client configuration and environment variables
subtasks.description: Configure Supabase client with proper environment variables and establish secure connection to Supabase Auth service
subtasks.details: Install @supabase/supabase-js package. Create .env.local file with NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY variables. Set up Supabase client instance in lib/supabase.js with createClient method. Configure proper TypeScript types for Supabase client. Test connection to Supabase project.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Supabase client connects successfully. Test environment variables are loaded correctly. Check TypeScript types are properly configured.

subtasks.title: Implement user registration and login functionality
subtasks.description: Create user registration and login forms with Supabase Auth integration using signUp and signInWithPassword methods
subtasks.details: Create registration form component with email and password fields. Implement signUp method from Supabase Auth with email confirmation. Build login form component with email/password authentication. Use signInWithPassword method for user login. Add form validation and error handling for auth operations. Implement loading states and user feedback messages.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test user registration with valid and invalid inputs. Verify login functionality with correct and incorrect credentials. Test form validation and error message display.

subtasks.title: Set up automatic session management and JWT handling
subtasks.description: Configure Supabase's built-in JWT token management and automatic session refresh capabilities
subtasks.details: Configure Supabase client to handle automatic JWT refresh. Set up session persistence using Supabase's built-in localStorage handling. Implement session state monitoring using onAuthStateChange listener. Configure token expiration handling and automatic renewal. Set up proper session cleanup on browser close.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test automatic token refresh functionality. Verify session persistence across browser sessions. Check session cleanup on logout and browser close.

subtasks.title: Create authentication context and client-side state management
subtasks.description: Build React context provider for managing authentication state and user session across the application
subtasks.details: Create AuthContext using React Context API. Build AuthProvider component that wraps the application. Implement useAuth custom hook for accessing auth state. Manage user session state with Supabase session object. Handle loading states during authentication checks. Provide auth methods (login, logout, register) through context.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test auth context provides correct user state. Verify useAuth hook returns proper authentication status. Check context updates correctly on auth state changes.

subtasks.title: Implement protected routes and email verification flow
subtasks.description: Create route protection middleware and email verification system using Supabase's getUser method and email confirmation
subtasks.details: Create ProtectedRoute component using Supabase's getUser method for route authorization. Implement middleware to check authentication status before accessing protected pages. Set up email verification flow using Supabase's email confirmation system. Create email verification page and confirmation handler. Implement logout functionality using Supabase's signOut method. Configure Supabase Auth policies for row-level security in database.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test protected routes block unauthenticated users. Verify email verification flow works correctly. Test logout functionality clears session properly. Check row-level security policies are enforced.

tasks.title: Create Basic UI Layout and Navigation
tasks.description: Develop the main application layout with responsive navigation and routing structure
tasks.details: Create main layout component with header, sidebar, and content area. Implement responsive navigation menu with active state indicators. Set up Next.js App Router with protected routes. Create login/register pages with form validation. Design dashboard layout for memo management. Implement dark/light theme toggle. Add loading states and error boundaries. Use Tailwind CSS for responsive design.
tasks.testStrategy: Test responsive design on mobile, tablet, and desktop. Verify navigation works correctly across all routes. Check protected routes redirect unauthenticated users. Test theme switching functionality. Validate form submissions and error handling.

tasks.title: Implement Text Memo CRUD Operations
tasks.description: Build core functionality for creating, reading, updating, and deleting text-based memos
tasks.details: Create API routes for memo operations (/api/memos GET, POST, PUT, DELETE). Implement memo creation form with title and content fields. Build memo list view with pagination and sorting options. Create memo detail/edit view with inline editing. Add memo deletion with confirmation dialog. Implement auto-save functionality for drafts. Add input validation and sanitization for XSS prevention.
tasks.testStrategy: Test CRUD operations with various memo content sizes. Verify pagination works with large datasets. Test auto-save functionality. Check input validation prevents malicious content. Test concurrent editing scenarios.

tasks.title: Integrate Web Speech API for STT Functionality
tasks.description: Implement speech-to-text conversion using Web Speech API for voice memo creation
tasks.details: Implement Web Speech API integration with browser compatibility checks. Create voice recording component with start/stop/pause controls. Add real-time speech recognition with interim results display. Implement error handling for speech recognition failures. Add microphone permission handling and user feedback. Create fallback for unsupported browsers. Implement voice command detection for basic controls (stop, pause).
tasks.testStrategy: Test speech recognition accuracy with various accents and languages. Verify microphone permissions work correctly. Test fallback behavior in unsupported browsers. Check real-time transcription performance. Test error recovery scenarios.

subtasks.title: Implement Browser Compatibility Detection and Web Speech API Setup
subtasks.description: Create browser compatibility checking system and initialize Web Speech API with proper fallback mechanisms
subtasks.details: Implement feature detection for Web Speech API support across different browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari). Create SpeechRecognition API initialization with proper vendor prefixes (webkitSpeechRecognition). Set up browser capability detection and user agent analysis. Create fallback messaging system for unsupported browsers. Implement progressive enhancement approach for speech functionality.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test compatibility detection across Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Safari browsers. Verify proper fallback behavior in unsupported browsers. Test vendor prefix handling for webkit-based browsers. Check progressive enhancement functionality.

subtasks.title: Create Voice Recording Component with Control Interface
subtasks.description: Build user interface components for voice recording with start, stop, pause, and resume controls
subtasks.details: Create React/Vue component for voice recording interface with visual feedback. Implement start/stop/pause/resume button controls with proper state management. Add visual indicators for recording status (recording, paused, stopped). Create microphone activity visualization with audio level indicators. Implement keyboard shortcuts for voice controls. Add recording duration timer and maximum recording time limits.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test all recording control buttons function correctly. Verify visual feedback responds to recording state changes. Test keyboard shortcuts work as expected. Check recording duration limits and timer accuracy. Test component renders properly across different screen sizes.

subtasks.title: Implement Microphone Permission Handling and User Feedback
subtasks.description: Handle microphone permissions, user consent, and provide clear feedback for permission states
subtasks.details: Implement getUserMedia() API for microphone access requests. Create permission state detection (granted, denied, prompt). Build user-friendly permission request flow with clear explanations. Add error handling for permission denied scenarios. Create UI feedback for different permission states. Implement permission revocation detection and recovery. Add troubleshooting guide for permission issues.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test permission request flow in different browsers. Verify proper handling of granted, denied, and prompt states. Test permission revocation detection. Check user feedback clarity and helpfulness. Test recovery mechanisms for permission issues.

subtasks.title: Develop Real-time Speech Recognition with Interim Results
subtasks.description: Implement continuous speech recognition with real-time transcription display and interim result handling
subtasks.details: Configure SpeechRecognition with continuous mode and interim results enabled. Implement real-time transcription display with interim and final result differentiation. Add speech recognition event handlers (onresult, onerror, onend). Create text processing for interim results with visual styling. Implement result confidence scoring and filtering. Add language and dialect configuration options. Create real-time text streaming to the memo interface.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test real-time transcription accuracy with various speech patterns. Verify interim results display properly before final results. Test confidence scoring and filtering effectiveness. Check language and dialect configuration works correctly. Test continuous recognition stability over extended periods.

subtasks.title: Implement Error Handling and Voice Command Detection
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive error handling system and implement voice command recognition for basic controls
subtasks.details: Implement error handling for network issues, audio device problems, and recognition failures. Create retry mechanisms with exponential backoff for transient errors. Add voice command detection for 'stop', 'pause', 'resume' commands within speech content. Implement error recovery strategies and user notification system. Create logging system for debugging speech recognition issues. Add graceful degradation for partial functionality loss. Implement command word filtering to prevent accidental triggering.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test error handling for various failure scenarios (network, microphone, API). Verify retry mechanisms work correctly with proper backoff. Test voice command detection accuracy and prevent false positives. Check error recovery and user notification systems. Test logging captures sufficient debugging information.

tasks.title: Integrate OpenAI API for Content Summarization
tasks.description: Implement AI-powered memo summarization using Claude API (Anthropic) integration
tasks.details: Set up Claude API client with proper error handling and rate limiting. Create summarization service that processes memo content using Claude's advanced text processing capabilities. Implement prompt engineering optimized for Claude's conversation format for consistent, quality summaries. Add API response caching to reduce costs. Create background job processing for AI operations. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff. Add token counting to manage API costs. Configure Claude-specific parameters like model selection and temperature settings.
tasks.testStrategy: Test summarization quality with various memo lengths and content types using Claude API. Verify API error handling and retry logic specific to Anthropic's service. Test rate limiting and cost management for Claude API usage. Check background processing performance. Validate summary accuracy and relevance with Claude's text processing. Test Claude-specific features like conversation context handling.

subtasks.title: Set up Claude API Client Configuration
subtasks.description: Configure Claude API client with authentication, environment variables, and basic connection setup
subtasks.details: Install @anthropic-ai/sdk package. Create environment variables for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Set up API client configuration with proper base URL and headers. Create a service class for Claude API interactions with connection validation. Configure model selection (claude-3-sonnet, claude-3-haiku) and default parameters like temperature and max_tokens. Add environment-specific configurations for development and production.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test API client initialization and authentication. Verify environment variable loading. Test connection to Claude API with simple requests.

subtasks.title: Implement Error Handling and Rate Limiting
subtasks.description: Add comprehensive error handling, retry logic, and rate limiting for Claude API requests
subtasks.details: Implement exponential backoff retry mechanism for API failures. Add rate limiting using a token bucket or sliding window approach to respect Anthropic's API limits. Create custom error classes for different API error types (rate limit, authentication, quota exceeded). Implement timeout handling for long-running requests. Add logging for API errors and retry attempts. Create circuit breaker pattern for API health monitoring.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test retry logic with simulated API failures. Verify rate limiting prevents exceeding API quotas. Test error handling for various API error scenarios. Check timeout behavior with delayed responses.

subtasks.title: Create Summarization Service with Prompt Engineering
subtasks.description: Build core summarization service with optimized prompts for Claude's conversation format
subtasks.details: Create SummarizationService class with methods for different summary types (brief, detailed, bullet points). Design prompt templates optimized for Claude's conversation format using proper message structure. Implement content preprocessing to handle different memo formats and lengths. Add prompt engineering for consistent summary quality with specific instructions for tone, length, and structure. Create summary validation to ensure output meets quality standards. Implement content chunking for large memos that exceed token limits.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test summarization quality with various memo content types and lengths. Verify prompt consistency produces reliable results. Test content chunking for large documents. Validate summary format and structure.

subtasks.title: Implement API Response Caching and Token Management
subtasks.description: Add caching layer for API responses and implement token counting for cost management
subtasks.details: Implement Redis-based caching for API responses with configurable TTL. Create cache key generation based on content hash to avoid duplicate API calls. Add token counting using tiktoken or similar library to estimate API costs before requests. Implement cost tracking and budget alerts. Create cache invalidation strategies for updated content. Add cache statistics and monitoring. Implement cache warming for frequently accessed content.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test cache hit/miss scenarios and verify response consistency. Test token counting accuracy against actual API usage. Verify cache invalidation works correctly. Test cost tracking and budget alert functionality.

subtasks.title: Create Background Job Processing System
subtasks.description: Implement asynchronous background processing for AI summarization operations
subtasks.details: Set up job queue system using Bull/BullMQ or similar for background processing. Create job definitions for summarization tasks with priority levels. Implement job workers that process summarization requests asynchronously. Add job status tracking and progress reporting for long-running tasks. Create job retry mechanisms with dead letter queue for failed jobs. Implement job scheduling for batch processing during off-peak hours. Add monitoring and alerting for job queue health.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test job queue processing with various workloads. Verify job retry mechanisms handle failures correctly. Test job status tracking and progress reporting. Check queue performance under high load scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement Automatic Category Classification
tasks.description: Build AI-powered automatic categorization system for memo organization using Claude API
tasks.details: Create category classification service using Claude API instead of OpenAI API. Implement predefined category system (Work, Personal, Ideas, Tasks, etc.). Allow users to create custom categories. Build classification confidence scoring using Claude's response analysis. Add manual category override functionality. Implement category suggestion based on memo content analysis through Claude API. Create category management interface. Configure Claude API client with proper authentication and rate limiting.
tasks.testStrategy: Test classification accuracy across different memo types using Claude API responses. Verify custom category creation and management. Test classification confidence thresholds with Claude's output. Check manual override functionality. Validate category suggestions relevance from Claude analysis. Test Claude API integration and error handling.

tasks.title: Build Search and Filtering System
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive search functionality with keyword, date, and category filtering
tasks.details: Implement full-text search using PostgreSQL's built-in search capabilities. Create search API with fuzzy matching and relevance scoring. Build advanced filter interface (date ranges, categories, tags). Add search highlighting and result ranking. Implement search suggestions and autocomplete. Add saved search functionality. Create search analytics to track popular queries.
tasks.testStrategy: Test search accuracy with various query types. Verify filtering combinations work correctly. Check search performance with large datasets. Test autocomplete responsiveness. Validate search result relevance and ranking.

tasks.title: Develop User Statistics and Analytics Dashboard
tasks.description: Create analytics dashboard showing user activity patterns and memo statistics
tasks.details: Implement analytics data collection for user actions. Create dashboard with memo creation frequency charts. Add category distribution visualizations. Build time-based activity analysis. Implement streak tracking for daily memo creation. Add export functionality for personal data. Create data aggregation jobs for performance.
tasks.testStrategy: Test data collection accuracy and privacy compliance. Verify chart visualizations render correctly. Test data export functionality. Check analytics performance with historical data. Validate statistical calculations.

tasks.title: Implement Data Security and Privacy Features
tasks.description: Add comprehensive security measures including data encryption and privacy controls
tasks.details: Implement data encryption at rest and in transit. Add API rate limiting and request validation. Create data export/deletion functionality for GDPR compliance. Implement audit logging for sensitive operations. Add content moderation for shared memos. Create backup and recovery procedures. Implement secure API key management.
tasks.testStrategy: Test encryption/decryption performance and accuracy. Verify rate limiting blocks malicious requests. Test GDPR compliance features. Check audit log completeness. Validate backup and recovery procedures.

subtasks.title: Implement Data Encryption at Rest and in Transit
subtasks.description: Set up comprehensive encryption for stored data and network communications
subtasks.details: Implement AES-256 encryption for sensitive data stored in the database. Configure TLS/SSL certificates for HTTPS communication. Set up field-level encryption for memo content and user data. Implement encryption key rotation mechanisms. Configure database encryption settings in Supabase. Add middleware to encrypt/decrypt data automatically during API operations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test encryption/decryption performance with various data sizes. Verify all sensitive data is encrypted in database. Test TLS certificate validity and secure connections. Validate key rotation procedures. Check encryption overhead impact on application performance.

subtasks.title: Implement API Rate Limiting and Request Validation
subtasks.description: Add protection against malicious requests and API abuse
subtasks.details: Set up rate limiting middleware using Redis or in-memory storage. Implement per-user and per-IP rate limits for different API endpoints. Add request validation using schema validation libraries. Implement input sanitization to prevent injection attacks. Set up CORS policies for secure cross-origin requests. Add request size limits and timeout configurations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test rate limiting blocks excessive requests from same IP/user. Verify malicious payloads are rejected by validation. Test CORS policies prevent unauthorized origins. Check request size limits work correctly. Validate timeout configurations prevent long-running requests.

subtasks.title: Create GDPR Data Export and Deletion Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement user data portability and right to be forgotten features
subtasks.details: Create API endpoints for user data export in JSON/CSV formats. Implement complete user data deletion including memos, categories, and associated metadata. Add data anonymization options for partial deletion. Create user consent management system. Implement data retention policies with automatic cleanup. Add audit trail for data export/deletion requests.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test complete data export includes all user information. Verify data deletion removes all traces from database and backups. Test anonymization preserves analytics while removing personal data. Check consent management tracks user preferences. Validate retention policies execute automatically.

subtasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Audit Logging System
subtasks.description: Create detailed logging for all sensitive operations and security events
subtasks.details: Set up structured logging for authentication events, data access, and modifications. Implement log aggregation and storage with retention policies. Add security event monitoring for failed login attempts and suspicious activities. Create audit log API for compliance reporting. Implement log integrity verification using checksums. Set up log rotation and archival procedures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all sensitive operations generate appropriate log entries. Test log integrity and tamper detection mechanisms. Check audit log API returns accurate compliance reports. Validate log rotation and archival work correctly. Test security event detection triggers appropriate alerts.

subtasks.title: Implement Secure Backup, Recovery, and API Key Management
subtasks.description: Create secure backup procedures and API key management system
subtasks.details: Set up automated encrypted database backups with offsite storage. Implement point-in-time recovery procedures. Create secure API key generation, rotation, and revocation system. Implement key vault or secure storage for API keys and secrets. Add backup integrity verification and recovery testing. Create disaster recovery procedures and documentation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test backup and recovery procedures with various scenarios. Verify backup encryption and integrity checks. Test API key rotation without service interruption. Check key vault security and access controls. Validate disaster recovery procedures restore full functionality.

tasks.title: Optimize Performance and Deploy Application
tasks.description: Implement performance optimizations and deploy the application to production environment using Vercel with Next.js optimization features and proper environment variable configuration
tasks.details: Implement lazy loading for memo components. Add database query optimization and indexing. Leverage Vercel's built-in CDN for static assets and Next.js optimization features including automatic code splitting, image optimization, and bundle optimization. Implement caching strategies utilizing Vercel's Edge Network caching. Configure Vercel environment variables for production with proper security practices. Set up Vercel deployment pipeline with GitHub integration. Configure monitoring and error tracking with Vercel Analytics integration. Utilize Vercel's automatic compression and minification features.
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct load testing with multiple concurrent users on Vercel deployment. Measure page load times using Vercel Analytics and Next.js performance metrics. Test Vercel deployment pipeline reliability through GitHub integration. Verify environment variable configuration works correctly in production. Check Vercel's Next.js optimization features are properly applied. Test monitoring and alerting systems integration with Vercel environment.

subtasks.title: Configure Vercel Project with Next.js Optimizations
subtasks.description: Set up Vercel project with optimal Next.js configuration and environment variables
subtasks.details: Create Vercel project and link to GitHub repository. Configure Next.js build settings for optimal Vercel deployment including automatic code splitting and image optimization. Set up production and preview environment variables in Vercel dashboard with proper security configuration.

subtasks.title: Implement Performance Optimizations for Vercel Next.js
subtasks.description: Apply performance optimizations leveraging Vercel's Next.js features
subtasks.details: Implement lazy loading for memo components using Next.js dynamic imports. Configure Vercel's automatic image optimization. Set up Next.js App Router optimizations. Add database query optimization and indexing. Utilize Vercel's automatic bundle splitting and compression.

subtasks.title: Configure Vercel Environment Variables and Security
subtasks.description: Set up secure environment variable configuration for production deployment
subtasks.details: Configure production environment variables in Vercel dashboard. Set up secure API key management. Configure environment-specific settings for database connections and external services. Implement proper environment variable validation.

subtasks.title: Set up Vercel Analytics and Monitoring
subtasks.description: Configure monitoring and analytics using Vercel's built-in tools
subtasks.details: Enable Vercel Analytics for performance monitoring and Next.js metrics. Set up Vercel's built-in monitoring dashboard. Configure deployment notifications and error tracking integration.

subtasks.title: Test Production Deployment with Next.js Features
subtasks.description: Conduct comprehensive testing of Vercel deployment with Next.js optimizations
subtasks.details: Test deployment pipeline reliability with GitHub integration. Verify Next.js optimization features are working correctly. Conduct load testing on Vercel infrastructure. Test environment variables work correctly in production. Verify Vercel Analytics data collection and Next.js performance metrics.
